title: lasianthus chrysophyllus
intro: Lasianthus chrysophyllus, also known as the golden-leaf lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lasianthus chrysophyllus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
